overview.description: The Brinsmere Fund Growth ETF (TBFG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed fund of funds with exposure to the global equity and bond markets. It uses two proprietary investment strategies to create a growth-focused portfolio. TBFG was launched on Jan 12, 2024 and is issued by The Brinsmere Funds.
